name: sod gate: every gate decision (allow or block) is appended to the C-4 audit log
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/verify compliance && printf '{"pr_sha":"abc123","verdict":"concur","reviewer":"verifier-bot"}' > .claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --pr-sha abc123 --verifier-output "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json" --enforce --audit-log "$PWD/compliance/audit.jsonl" && grep "sod-gate" compliance/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && grep "abc123" compliance/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
